name: DecideAct A/S
summary: DecideAct A/S develops cloud-based strategy execution management and governance platform for organizations. Its solutions include DecideAct Professional, a digital solution for strategy implementation and follow-up; DecideAct Managed, a managed platform for strategy execution management and governance to drive engagement through transparency, automated follow-ups, and reporting; DecideAct Enterprise, a digital solution to integrate with ERP systems and other data sources defined by the organization; DecideAct Public Sector, which helps in the execution of government priorities within public institutions; a corporate social responsibility solution; a crisis recovery platform for enabling organizations to execute their recovery plan; and strategy expert services. The company's integrated strategy implementation platform delivers transparency, accountability, follow-up, and governance. DecideAct A/S was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Nex√É¬∏, Denmark.
